name: Vegetable Paella
recipeIngredient: 1 medium-size red onion, peeled and sliced
1 red bell pepper cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the bottom of a large, heavy-lidded pot with nonstick spray and heat to medium.
2. Saute onion rings and garlic.
3. Add rice and stir to brown lightly.
4. Add vegetable stock and tomatoes.
5. Stir in turmeric, carrots, and artichoke hearts.
6. Cover and reduce heat to simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Add remaining ingredients (bell pepper, peas, corn) and cover.
8. Continue to simmer for 10 to 15 more minutes until rice is done.
- If using brown rice, add carrots and artichoke hearts when 20 minutes of cooking time remains.
- Add the remaining ingredients 10 minutes later.
Makes 6 servings (Per serving: 173 calories, 1 gram fat)
